attributes.action: In the interest of British security a general election must be called
attributes.additional_details: We call for urgent action to protect the British people. Concerns include weak responses to threats against UK interests domestic and overseas, declining global leadership, strained international relationships, failures to control illegal migration, public views being overlooked, and poor financial management that relies too heavily on taxation. The UK must act now to restore safety, trust, and accountability in politics and do what is asked of them by the people and not there own selfish acts
attributes.background: We ask Parliament to dissolve this government and call a general election on the grounds of ongoing national security and ensure continued protection for the British people during ongoing global conflicts. Recent events raise concerns about public safety, trust in current Government leadership.

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petition, which calls for similar action:

Dissolve Parliament and call a General Election now!
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/750050
